name: Potato-Vegetable Chowder
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Vegetable broth (water is fine, but not as tasty)
1 cup Tomatoes, peeled and cut into small pieces
1 cup Green beans or yellow wax beans
1 cup Zucchini or yellow squash, thinly sliced
1 cheesecloth bag of fresh herbs of choice (parsley, basil, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring liquid to boil in a deep soup kettle.
2. Add all vegetables and seasonings.
3. Turn down heat to simmer and partially cover the pot.
4. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
5. Serve hot with crusty whole wheat bread and a light fruit dessert.
Variation: Almost any vegetable, but onions, tomatoes, and potatoes can be substituted for another vegetable. Avoid using cabbage family members as the flavor will change too much. Green peas and baby lima beans are great additions, along with corn kernels (about 1/2 cup).
